# render

```go
import "github.com/shaobaobaoer/solarsage-mcp/pkg/render"
```

Package render provides coordinate calculations for chart wheel visualization. It converts chart data into x/y positions suitable for SVG, Canvas, or any 2D rendering system. All coordinates are normalized to a unit circle.

Use CalcChartWheel for planet/house/aspect coordinates and CalcSignSegments for zodiac sign label positions.

Package render provides coordinate calculations for chart wheel visualization. It converts chart data into x/y positions suitable for SVG, Canvas, or any 2D rendering system. All coordinates are normalized to a unit circle \(0\-1 range\).

<a name="AspectLine"></a>
## type [AspectLine](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/render/render.go#L35-L41>)

AspectLine holds rendering data for an aspect line between two planets

```go
type AspectLine struct {
    PlanetA    string            `json:"planet_a"`
    PlanetB    string            `json:"planet_b"`
    Start      Point             `json:"start"`
    End        Point             `json:"end"`
    AspectType models.AspectType `json:"aspect_type"`
}
```

<a name="ChartWheel"></a>
## type [ChartWheel](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/render/render.go#L44-L51>)

ChartWheel holds all rendering coordinates for a chart wheel

```go
type ChartWheel struct {
    Planets  []PlanetGlyph `json:"planets"`
    Houses   []HouseLine   `json:"houses"`
    Aspects  []AspectLine  `json:"aspects"`
    ASCAngle float64       `json:"asc_angle"`
    Center   Point         `json:"center"`
    Radius   float64       `json:"radius"`
}
```

<a name="CalcChartWheel"></a>
### func [CalcChartWheel](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/render/render.go#L56>)

```go
func CalcChartWheel(chartInfo *models.ChartInfo, radius float64) *ChartWheel
```

CalcChartWheel generates rendering coordinates for a chart wheel. The ASC is placed at the left \(9 o'clock position\) and signs proceed counter\-clockwise. radius controls the overall size \(0.5 for unit square centering\).

<a name="HouseLine"></a>
## type [HouseLine](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/render/render.go#L27-L32>)

HouseLine holds rendering data for a house cusp line

```go
type HouseLine struct {
    House int     `json:"house"`
    Start Point   `json:"start"`
    End   Point   `json:"end"`
    Angle float64 `json:"angle"`
}
```

<a name="PlanetGlyph"></a>
## type [PlanetGlyph](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/render/render.go#L19-L24>)

PlanetGlyph holds rendering data for a planet on the chart wheel

```go
type PlanetGlyph struct {
    PlanetID models.PlanetID `json:"planet_id"`
    Position Point           `json:"position"`
    Angle    float64         `json:"angle"` // degrees from ASC (counter-clockwise)
    Ring     float64         `json:"ring"`  // 0=center, 1=outer
}
```

<a name="Point"></a>
## type [Point](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/render/render.go#L13-L16>)

Point represents a 2D coordinate

```go
type Point struct {
    X   float64 `json:"x"`
    Y   float64 `json:"y"`
}
```

<a name="SignSegment"></a>
## type [SignSegment](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/render/render.go#L141-L147>)

SignSegment holds the angular extent of a zodiac sign on the wheel

```go
type SignSegment struct {
    Sign       string  `json:"sign"`
    StartAngle float64 `json:"start_angle"`
    EndAngle   float64 `json:"end_angle"`
    MidAngle   float64 `json:"mid_angle"`
    MidPoint   Point   `json:"mid_point"`
}
```

<a name="CalcSignSegments"></a>
### func [CalcSignSegments](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/render/render.go#L150>)

```go
func CalcSignSegments(ascLon, radius float64) []SignSegment
```

CalcSignSegments returns the 12 zodiac sign segments for the chart wheel.
